issues: No diff was produced in the evaluated worktree
Evidence indicates edits were made to `eval/routing-policy.test.mjs`, not the requested paths
Claimed passing tests are not backed by changes in the validated worktree
strengths: The run appears to have identified relevant heuristic cases
It attempted lightweight no-dependency Node tests
The proposed tests target the requested routing scenarios
parsedJudgeResponse.summary: The implementation should be judged incorrect for this harness run because the validated worktree contains no diff at all, and none of the required paths were changed. Although the stdout artifact shows an attempted addition of regression tests and passing local test output, that evidence points to edits in `eval/routing-policy.test.mjs` outside the required target paths, not to persistent changes in the evaluated worktree. Since correctness and task completion must be established from the actual validated diff, this run fails despite showing plausible intent and some relevant test content.
